description_long: This object is a large-frame revolver-style handgun with a long barrel and a robust, metallic construction. The frame and barrel are primarily dark metal, showing signs of wear and use, while the grip is made of wood with a visibly textured, slightly weathered finish. The cylinder is prominent and appears to hold six rounds, with the trigger guard and hammer both clearly defined. The barrel is elongated and unadorned, lacking any visible compensators or threading, and the overall design is utilitarian with minimal decorative elements. The grip is contoured for ergonomic handling, and the trigger guard is rounded and sturdy. No visible manufacturer markings or engravings are present on the frame or barrel.
description: A large, dark metal revolver with a long barrel and a textured wooden grip, showing signs of wear and robust construction.
description_view_0: The handgun is viewed from the muzzle end, showing the circular barrel opening and the front of the cylinder, with the wooden grip visible below.
description_view_1: A full side profile reveals the long barrel, large cylinder, contoured wooden grip, and the rounded trigger guard.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the back of the cylinder, hammer, and the top of the grip, with the barrel extending forward.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile displays the same long barrel, cylinder, and wooden grip, with similar details as the other side.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is made of wood with a natural, slightly weathered finish, featuring a gentle ergonomic contour that fits the palm. Its surface is subtly textured, likely from the wood grain, and there are no visible checkering or stippling patterns. The grip is slightly flared at the base for improved handling, and no logos, finger grooves, or decorative embellishments are present.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and robust, with a medium thickness that provides ample protection for the trigger. It is smooth and untextured, lacking any undercuts, squared-off edges, or integrated accessories. The design is simple and functional, with no reinforcement or distinctive styling elements.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is long and straight, with a standard round profile and no visible threading, porting, or compensators. It has a matte dark finish consistent with the rest of the frame, and there are no external markings or fluting present.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the frame or barrel. The surfaces are plain and unadorned, with no manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or decorative patterns apparent.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: As a revolver, this handgun does not have a detachable magazine base or floorplate. The base of the grip is flat and slightly flared, with the wooden texture continuing to the bottom, and no finger rests, logos, or additional texturing are visible.
